title: T-007 вЂ” Workflow rule definitions: po/to/wo state machines (rule registry)
prompt:
Author the 3 state-machine rule definitions in 02-SETTINGS rule registry per PRD В§16.1: `po_state_machine_v1`, `to_state_machine_v1`, `wo_state_machine_v1`. Encode each as a DSL JSON file under `src/rules/planning/v1/<name>.json` containing: states[], transitions[] (with from, to, action, guards[], side_effects[]), version='v1'. Guards reference declarative predicates ('lines.count > 0', 'first_grn_received', 'all_lines_fully_received'). Side-effects emit outbox events ('po.state_changed', 'to.state_changed', 'wo.state_changed').

Register rules in 02-SETTINGS В§7 rule registry table at app boot via `src/rules/planning/v1/register.ts`. RED test: `src/rules/planning/v1/__tests__/state_machines.test.ts` invokes registered rule for sample transitions (draftв†’submitted PO, draftв†’planned TO, DRAFTв†’RELEASED WO) and verifies guards + emits.

pipeline_inputs.description: DSL rule definitions for PO/TO/WO state machines registered into 02-SETTINGS rule registry (workflow-as-data per ADR-029).
pipeline_inputs.details: Each rule JSON conforms to 02-SETTINGS В§7 rule schema: { rule_id, version, states, transitions, guards, side_effects, audit_required }. Registration runs at app bootstrap; idempotent via UPSERT. Engine `@monopilot/workflow-engine` from 02-SETTINGS В§7 evaluates definitions. Side-effect contract: `outbox_events` insert (transactional with state change). Guards declared as named predicates resolved by engine guard resolver. WO transitions cover the 7 statuses per В§5.6.
acceptance_criteria: Given the registration runs at boot, when rule registry is queried, then 3 entries exist with version='v1'.
Given a PO with status='submitted' and lines.count=0, when transitionв†’submitted attempted, then guard fails per V-PLAN-PO-003 and no outbox row is written.
Given a WO transition DRAFTв†’RELEASED with material check enabled, when triggered, then outbox event 'wo.state_changed' is recorded in same DB transaction.
Given `pnpm vitest run src/rules/planning/v1/__tests__/state_machines.test.ts`, when run, then 0 failures.
test_strategy: RED tests for guard failures + outbox emission per transition.
risk_red_lines: Do not hardcode workflow logic in service files вЂ” must live in DSL rules per В§16.1.
Do not bypass engine for any state transition вЂ” all changes must traverse rule.
Do not skip outbox emission вЂ” analytics + 12-REPORTING depend on the event stream.
